name: signingCreateAccount
title: Create Account via Signing Service
description: Create a new signing key and on-chain account in one step. Optionally fund via faucet. Authenticated.

passphrase.description: Passphrase to encrypt the new signing key

faucet.description: Faucet amount in copper (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper, max 1 CVM).

address.description: Address of the newly created account

publicKey.description: Hex-encoded public key of the created signing key
